title: RapidMeta Cardiology | ATTR Cardiomyopathy NMA (Tafamidis + Vutrisiran + Acoramidis) v1.0
hero_h2: Disease-Modifying Therapy for Transthyretin Amyloid Cardiomyopathy: Tafamidis, Vutrisiran, Acoramidis

pico.pop: Adults with transthyretin amyloid cardiomyopathy (ATTR-CM, wild-type or hereditary), NYHA I-III, with cardiac involvement confirmed by tissue biopsy or 99mTc-PYP scintigraphy
pico.int: Disease-modifying therapy: TTR stabilizer tafamidis 80 mg PO QD (ATTR-ACT) or acoramidis 800 mg PO BID (ATTRibute-CM); or hepatic-TTR-silencing siRNA vutrisiran 25 mg SC every 3 months (HELIOS-B)
pico.comp: Placebo on top of standard heart failure care
pico.out: All-cause mortality at trial endpoint (HR vs placebo; primary composite endpoint also reported per trial)
pico.subgroup: Genotype (wild-type vs variant TTR), NYHA class, NT-proBNP, 6-minute walk distance, age, sex

real_data_entries.name: ATTR-ACT
real_data_entries.group: Tafamidis 80 mg or 20 mg PO QD vs placebo in ATTR-CM (wild-type or hereditary); 30-month follow-up; primary hierarchical death + CV hospitalization

allOutcomes.title: All-cause mortality at month 30 (HR vs placebo)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Maurer MS et al. NEJM 2018;379:1007-1016 (ATTR-ACT tafamidis).

real_data_entries.name: HELIOS-B
real_data_entries.group: Vutrisiran 25 mg SC every 3 months vs placebo in ATTR-CM (incl. ~30% on tafamidis at baseline); 36-month primary composite (death + recurrent CV events)

allOutcomes.title: All-cause mortality (HR vs placebo, monotherapy population)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Fontana M et al. NEJM 2024 (HELIOS-B vutrisiran).

real_data_entries.name: ATTRibute-CM
real_data_entries.group: Acoramidis 800 mg PO BID vs placebo in ATTR-CM; 30-month hierarchical primary (death + CV hosp + NT-proBNP + 6MWD); win ratio 1.8

allOutcomes.title: All-cause mortality at month 30 (HR vs placebo)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Gillmore JD et al. NEJM 2024;390:132-142 (ATTRibute-CM acoramidis).
